title: Compulsory status  options

posts.author: acrowe (Adam Crowe)
posts.cookedHtml:
Wanting to make a status column require an update from the default value. This would mean being able to treat the default column as a blank value.

Use Case:
I have an item with 7 sub items The sub items all have relationships. I do not want a team member to be able to change the status of a sub-item, if the above sub-item is blank (default)
